vulnerabilities.description: Lack of input validation and sanitation in the data models which can lead to potential injection attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement comprehensive input validation using a library like Joi and ensure all inputs are sanitized before processing.

vulnerabilities.description: There is no evidence of helmet and CORS configurations being used, which are essential for HTTP headers protection and CORS policy.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate Helmet middleware and configure CORS with a whitelist to enhance security on API endpoints.

vulnerabilities.description: No mention of JWT configuration and permission checks (RBAC/ABAC) in the provided code. This can lead to unauthorized access.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure proper JWT authentication middleware is implemented on all API endpoints along with role-based access control.

vulnerabilities.description: Potential logging of sensitive information due to omission of logging practices in the current scope.
vulnerabilities.fix: Adopt secure logging practices using a library like Winston to avoid exposing sensitive information in logs.
